description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a modern Mediterranean influence, featuring white exterior walls and a series of reddish-brown gable roofs. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a small porch, flanked by lush landscaping and a paved walkway leading to the main door. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the structure, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house includes an attached garage on one side and a spacious backyard patio area enclosed by a wooden fence. The driveway connects directly to a wide street, and the property is bordered by a mix of greenery and hardscaping. The overall design emphasizes comfort, openness, and a blend of indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with white walls, reddish-brown gable roofs, large windows, and a landscaped front yard with an attached garage and backyard patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, attached garage, landscaped walkway, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, backyard patio, and the connection to the street.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, secondary building volume, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the patio area, side windows, and the transition from the driveway to the backyard.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and landscaped approach, featuring a single door and minimal overhang.
